summary: Made a surgical exit-continuity adjustment so August's deadline to Cora explicitly lands as ten days, matching the chapter 5 handoff while preserving the scene's beats and tone. No opening rewrite was needed because chapter 4's bank-entry opening already differs structurally from the adjacent visible supper/interior opening.
edits: Added August's explicit 'Ten days' phrasing to the revised-extension notice.
Adjusted Cora's immediate reply so chapter 5's memory of 'August's ten days' has a direct source in chapter 4.
